description: A film has been accepted into an international film festival. An agent needs to book flights and hotels for the director and two lead actors.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the travel dates and the list of attendees.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the required travel details.

nodes.task_description: Search for flights and hotels that meet the company's travel policy and budget.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds suitable flight and hotel options.

nodes.task_description: Book the selected flights and hotels and send the itineraries to the attendees.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully completes all bookings and sends confirmations.
